description: baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in red with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this smooth blended bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 25 cmWidth: 39 cmDepth: 11 cmMade of smooth blended fabric and synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with an internal zipped pocket One pocket at the side of the main compartment with a magnetic button closure and one small zipped pocket on the other sideTwo short handles for carrying ease Two zipped pockets on the front with asymmetric openings for enhanced spaceSmall zipped pocket on backBuckle design for styleStylish, easy to grip, synthetic leather zip pullsBrand name printed on the back below the zipped pocketBag careWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
